result.summary: google.com exposes documented developer integration surfaces including the Travel Partner REST API, the Developer Knowledge REST API, the Developer Knowledge MCP server, and the gcloud CLI; these use Google Cloud API keys and/or Google OAuth access tokens depending on the surface.
result.description: Google provides a large set of developer products and cloud services. Within the surfaces verified here for google.com, the documented offerings include the Hotel Center Travel Partner API and the Developer Knowledge service for programmatic access to Google developer documentation.

gcp_api_key.label: Google Cloud API key
gcp_api_key.setup: In the [Google Cloud Console Credentials page](https://console.cloud.google.com/apis/credentials), create an **API key** in a project where the target API is enabled. For Developer Knowledge, the docs say to restrict the key to **Developer Knowledge API**; if you also use it for Gemini model calls, also allow **Generative Language API**. For Travel Partner / Hotel APIs, enable the product API in your project first and create the key from the same credentials page.

gcp_oauth_access_token.label: Google OAuth 2.0 access token / user or service principal token
gcp_oauth_access_token.setup: Set up Google authentication using the easiest supported path for your client. For MCP, Google documents user authentication via the [Google Cloud CLI](https://docs.cloud.google.com/sdk/docs/install): install it, run `gcloud init` / sign in, and configure your AI application to use that identity as described in [Authenticate to MCP servers](https://docs.cloud.google.com/mcp/authenticate-mcp). Google Cloud MCP docs also support agent identity flows for workloads on Google Cloud or external environments. This yields a bearer access token the client uses to call authenticated Google surfaces.

variables.name: account
variables.resolveFrom: Google Hotel Center account resource name
variables.description: Resource path segment such as `accounts/{account_id}` used by many Travel Partner API methods.
